rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Chrome Spawned by Powershell with Load-Extension in Command Line

rules.rule_text:
title: Chrome Spawned by Powershell with Load-Extension in Command Line
id: 4007bc45-1727-405d-a7bc-4b3d441bf08f
status: experimental
description: Detects instances of the Chrome browser executable spawning from PowerShell
  with a corresponding command line that includes appdata\local as a parameter.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/blog/chromeloader/
- https://blogs.vmware.com/security/2022/09/the-evolution-of-the-chromeloader-malware.html
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/07
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1176
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \powershell.exe
    Image|endswith: \chrome.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - appdata\local
    - load-extension
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
